hyperedges.description: ModeGrid construction pipeline: factory functions generate vertices and sides, construct Mode objects, then assemble them into a ModeGrid
Scattering calculation pipeline: ModeGrid provides the k-space basis that both FieldVector and ScatteringMatrix operate on

Numerical integration pipeline: modes provide integration domains (via vertices/weights), geometry_utils provides area/intersection measures, function_utils vectorizes integrands, integration_utils orchestrates quadpy-based cubature

hyperedges.description: ModeGrid construction pipeline: factory functions generate vertices and sides, construct Mode objects, then assemble them into a ModeGrid
Scattering calculation pipeline: ModeGrid provides the k-space basis that both FieldVector and ScatteringMatrix operate on

Numerical integration pipeline: modes provide integration domains (via vertices/weights), geometry_utils provides area/intersection measures, function_utils vectorizes integrands, integration_utils orchestrates quadpy-based cubature
